hero.title: We Organize, Professionalize and Scale Organizations.
hero.desc: Cacciatore & Cacciatore is a law firm specialized in Business Law, Compliance and Expansion. We are strategic partners in the growth of your company and business. We form an interdisciplinary ecosystem for business expansion, strategic consulting, Compliance, Academy and B2B business generation to scale brands and franchises.

ecosistema.label: Who We Are
ecosistema.title: A strategic hub. Not a service provider.
ecosistema.p1: Cacciatore & Cacciatore is an integrated business ecosystem connecting companies with specialized professionals, investors and technology.
ecosistema.p2: We are not an isolated service provider. We are the hub where corporate strategy, technology, the legal framework and commercial execution dialogue under the same method.
ecosistema.p3: For years, companies tried to solve their challenges in a fragmented way: one advisor on one side, disconnected technology on the other, and critical decisions made without cross-information. The result: loss of value, stagnation and dependence on their founders.
ecosistema.p1_legal_sub: Corporate law, franchising, compliance and contracts. All the legal support your company needs to operate safely.
ecosistema.p2_estrategia_sub: We don't deliver reports and then disappear. We design the strategy and execute it side by side with your team.
ecosistema.p3_ia_sub: We automate workflows, incorporate virtual assistants and optimize data for efficient, frictionless operations.
ecosistema.p4_exp_sub: The definitive corporate bridge between Spain and Argentina. We facilitate the safe landing and expansion of companies on both continents.

espana_arg.label: International Expansion
espana_arg.title: Spain–Argentina Strategic Hub
espana_arg.intro: Sustainable growth requires dynamic markets. At Cacciatore & Cacciatore we operate as the definitive corporate bridge for the internationalization of business and capital.
espana_arg.es_ar_text: We facilitate the safe and strategic landing of Spanish companies and investors seeking high-yield opportunities in Argentina, providing specialized advice, legal and accounting solutions, compliance, corporate structure, business architecture and operational and commercial viability.
espana_arg.ar_es_text: At the same time, we structure and accompany the expansion of Argentine brands and business models to Spain, opening the door to the European market through franchise schemes, licenses, distribution, dropshipping and the promotion of strategic commercial alliances.
espana_arg.step2_text: Active search for capital and business opportunities and M&A (Mergers and Acquisitions).
espana_arg.step3_text: Adaptation of business models for international franchises, with a Legal Compliance-based approach.

problema.label: The Problem
problema.title: Why the traditional approach no longer works.
problema.text: For years, companies have tried to solve their challenges in a fragmented way: one advisor on one side, disconnected technology on the other, and critical business decisions made without cross-information. The result: loss of value, stagnation and dependence on their founders.
problema.sol_text: We are not an isolated service provider. We are an ecosystem where corporate strategy, technology, the legal framework and commercial execution dialogue under the same disruptive method.
problema.sol_text2: We operate as a strategic hub that connects companies with specialized professionals, entrepreneurs with investors and other entrepreneurs, and throughout the process we integrate applied technology.
problema.sol_text3: We do not offer fragmented solutions; we design, implement, and execute comprehensive strategies so that your company grows with profitability, legal security, traceability, and a long-term vision.

metodo.label: How We Do It
metodo.title: C&C® Method — From Strategy to Execution
metodo.intro: Our methodology is auditable, scalable and 100% results-oriented. This is how we transform your company's structure:
metodo.s1_text: We analyze the business as a system (commercial, operational, financial, technological). We detect bottlenecks and risks facing your organization.
metodo.s2_text: We define concrete objectives based on data, regulatory framework and financial viability.
metodo.s3_title: Design and Execution of Strategic Improvements
metodo.s3_text: We optimize resources, processes and technology. We incorporate intelligent automation where it generates the highest ROI.
metodo.s4_text: We document every operational process and shield the company with integrity policies and risk prevention.
metodo.s5_text: We don't deliver a report and then disappear. We execute the plan side by side with your team, jointly and strategically.
metodo.manual_text: The final deliverable of our method is your company's documented know-how. It is the tool that allows your company to grow in an orderly and legally secure way, making your business model replicable and scalable, elevating your brand to be franchisable, while also enabling the granting of licenses or the entry of capital.
metodo.cta: Apply the Method to My Company

servicios.label: Solutions Ecosystem
servicios.title: Integrated Corporate Solutions
servicios.c1_text: Corporate structure. Strategic consulting. Organizational design, process management and management tools for sustainable growth.
servicios.c2_text: Commercial development and expansion. Identification of new opportunities, alliance structuring and scalable growth models. B2B and B2C business generation.
servicios.c3_text: Corporate governance. Implementation of ethical reporting channels, risk prevention and consolidation of a culture of institutional transparency.
servicios.c4_text: High-level executive training. Programs developed by active leaders, focused on equipping management teams with real tools for complex contexts.
servicios.c5_text: Enterprise Artificial Intelligence. Workflow automation, virtual assistants and data optimization for efficient, frictionless operations.

resultados.label: The Real Impact
resultados.title: What do you achieve by integrating your company into our ecosystem?
resultados.r3: Drastic reduction of operational costs through AI and processes.
resultados.r4: Structure ready to franchise or license.
resultados.r5: Mitigation of legal and reputational risks.
resultados.r6: Decision-making based on precise control dashboards.

ia.label: Innovation
ia.title: Artificial Intelligence in Law
ia.p1: At Cacciatore & Cacciatore we are pioneers in integrating AI tools into legal work processes. We don't just use the technology: we adapt it to your organization's real needs.
ia.p2: AI does not replace the lawyer: it empowers them. We reduce operational times, minimize errors and free professionals to focus on strategy and the client.
ia.f1: Up to 70% reduction in document review times
ia.f2: Automated contract analysis with risk detection
ia.f5: Accelerated due diligence for corporate transactions
ia.c1_text: AI tools to review contracts in minutes, automatically identifying abusive clauses, inconsistencies and legal risks.
ia.c2_text: Semantic search of jurisprudence, doctrine and relevant regulations for each case, with automated synthesis of results.
ia.c3_text: Generation and adaptation of court briefs, contracts and legal documents with assistance from specialized language models.
ia.c4_text: Mass document processing for M&A operations, investments and legal audits, reducing timelines from weeks to days.

cta_final.label: The Next Step
cta_final.title: It's time to take your company to the next strategic level.
cta_final.text: From professionalizing your company, to expanding your brand commercially between Spain and Argentina or channeling investments with full legal backing: we have the team and the methodology to execute it with precision.
cta_final.cta: Schedule a Meeting with a Partner

footer.desc: Experience, Ethics and Professional Commitment. Comprehensive legal solutions for companies that want to grow solidly.
footer.rights: © 2025 Cacciatore & Cacciatore Attorneys at Law. All rights reserved.

team.title: THE GO HARVEY® TEAM
team.subtitle: Executive governance. Strategic direction. Integrated business ecosystem.
team.intro: Each role within the Cacciatore&Cacciatore® business ecosystem fulfills a specific function in value creation, integrating strategic direction, technical execution and interdisciplinary specialization in every project we lead.
team.structureLabel: This is how our operational ecosystem is structured.

core.title: CORPORATE CORE | C-LEVEL
core.text: GO HARVEY® is led by its Founding Partners, who constitute its governing and management bodies.

sub2.title: STRATEGIC ADVISORS | PROJECT LEADERS
sub2.sub: Strategic advisors. Operational leadership for project execution.

advisors.title: ADVISORS NETWORK | Unit: Cacciatore&Cacciatore CONSULTING™
advisors.sub: Network of independent professional advisors and consultants, experts in various disciplines.
advisors.p1: At GO HARVEY® we bring together professionals with executive experience in strategic consulting, corporate governance, compliance, organizational transformation, expansion and business development. Our teams have led processes of organization, professionalization and growth in companies across different industries, sizes and sectors.
advisors.p2: We don't make abstract recommendations — we get involved in each specific project or case, applying our Corporate Drone Method™ so that actions become real, measurable and sustainable results over time.

academy.title: ACADEMIC FACULTY | Unit: GO HARVEY ACADEMY™
academy.p1: The business unit called GO HARVEY ACADEMY™ operates as a Business School. It has professionals who make up the GO HARVEY® academic faculty, responsible for designing and delivering executive training programs in different business areas.
academy.p2: GO HARVEY® academic programs are taught by professionals with real market experience, who integrate the ecosystem from practice, research and executive training.
